'''Lemo''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who sported a thick beard and long, ginger [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that he tied back with a white headband.

==Biography==
Lemo, along with his partner [[Sanda]], was the leader of a [[Lemo and Sanda's gang|group of thugs]] on [[Arcan IV]]. They had apparently had some run-ins with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and were all glad that he had finally been captured. It was while celebrating this fact that [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]—disguised as [[Barpotomous Drebble/Legends|Barpotomous Drebble]]—and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] approached Lemo and his crew with a proposal.

Lemo was suspicious but played the dutiful host, plying Calrissian with [[Deltron spice wine]] until his guest drunkenly revealed his allegiance to Solo. Following a high-velocity [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] chase, Lemo's gang had the two rebels cornered when it was revealed that Calrissian was in possession of a precious statue that the gang had long sought. [[Dafi (criminal)|Dafi]], a member of Lemo's gang, became crazed at the discovery and slaughtered Lemo's companions in order to keep the statue for herself, although Lemo and Sanda luckily escaped with their lives. They retrieved the statue and kept it in their hideout on [[Arcan IV]].

Shortly after their encounter with Calrissian, Lemo and Sanda were captured by a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] in the [[Keyorin system/Legends|Keyorin system]] and incarcerated in a [[Belderone sector prison asteroid|prison asteroid]] in the [[Belderone sector/Legends|same sector]]. After the Battle of Endor, Solo and Luke Skywalker traveled to the asteroid and questioned the prisoners about the Dancing Goddess statue. In exchange for the statue's location, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] offered to pull the strings needed to get Lemo and his companion released, along with twenty thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. The Rebels recovered the statue and presumably followed through with the deal.
